title: Deprecated strftime() function
description: Code calls PHP's strftime() which was deprecated in PHP 8.1. CMSMS provides locale_ftime() as a replacement since 2.2.16.
explanation: PHP's strftime() was deprecated in PHP 8.1 and removed in PHP 9.0. CMSMS 2.2.16+ provides locale_ftime() as a drop-in replacement, and CMSMS 2.2.17+ provides CMSMS\strftime as a fallback. For Smarty templates, use the |localedate_format modifier instead of |date_format.
fix: Replace strftime() with locale_ftime() in PHP code. In templates, replace |date_format with |localedate_format.
